videos.headline: Diego Pavia's 21-yard TD run pads Vandy's lead
videos.description: Diego Pavia escapes the pocket and takes it 21 yards to the end zone to extend Vanderbilt's lead.

videos.headline: Diego Pavia's big run sets up 1-yard score
videos.description: Diego Pavia powers his way into the end zone to give Vanderbilt a 7-3 lead.

videos.headline: Zavion Thomas breaks multiple tackles before going 62 yards for a LSU TD
videos.description: Garrett Nussmeier dumps it off to Zavion Thomas for a 62-yard touchdown pass to pull LSU within 3.

videos.headline: Vanderbilt's Lea on Pavia vs. LSU: 'He was a magician out here'
videos.description: Clark Lea explains how QB Diego Pavia created opportunities for the No. 17 Commodores in their 'team win' vs. the No. 10 Tigers, securing Vandy's first 6-1 start since 1950.

videos.headline: Diego Pavia shows love to hometown supporters, Vandy teammates
videos.description: Following the Commodores' first win over LSU since 1990, Pavia declares his dedication to his teammates, saying "if no one has their six, I must be dead."
